https://topdanceled.com/indoor-vs-outdoo.spec_table:
Feature | Outdoor LED Screens | Indoor LED Screens
Viewing Distance | Optimized for longer distances | Designed for closer viewing
Pixel Pitch | Wider, for visibility from afar | Tighter, for clearer detail up close
Resolution | Lower, suitable for distance viewing | Higher, ideal for detailed visuals
Image Quality | Focused on visibility | Superior, due to high resolution
Ideal Use | Broad visibility in expansive areas | Detailed visuals in confined spaces
